clues: An external GPU connected via Thunderbolt is performing well below expected speeds.
The eGPU enclosure fans are spinning and the GPU is detected by the system.
The GPU performance improves temporarily when the laptop is plugged into the power adapter.
The laptop's power plan has PCIe Link State Power Management set to 'Maximum Power Savings'.
The aggressive power saving setting limits the Thunderbolt bandwidth to the eGPU.
